title: Editor Update 2.0.0
body:
The Cache Editor is now available in alpha. 
Some features remain under development.
Feedback via GitLab Issues.

More information and downloads can be found under the Tools section.

title: Editor Update 2.0.2
body:
Changelogs:
- Fixed application freeze when deleting text from the search field.
- Added a new button to export object defs.
- Downloads are now served directly from the web (repo), eliminating dependencies on external URLs.

For bug reports and feature requests, please visit GitLab Issues.
Full details and downloads are available under the Tools section.

title: Editor Release 2.0.3
body:
Changelogs:
- Pre-defined templates have been added to make reporting easier and more structured.
- Separate params table from the advance tab in the NPC editor.
- Some unknown fields have been replaced with more descriptive, meaningful labels.  
- Field groups in editors have also been reorganized to improve clarity and usability. 
- For downloads and further information, visit the Tools section.

Note: To create an issue or feature request, a GitLab account is required.
Issues: https://gitlab.com/rspsdev/editor-issues/-/issues/new?description_template=Bug_Report
Feature request: https://gitlab.com/rspsdev/editor-issues/-/issues/new?description_template=Feature_Request

title: Editor Release 2.0.4
body: Changelogs: - Fixed all search fields. Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Support panel update 1.0.1
body: Changelogs: - Fix multiple opening panel on plugin reload; - NPC load dynamically from cache instead of hardcoded values; Compiled code Proceed to download Source code Proceed to download

title: Editor Version: 2.0.5
body: Changelog: - Renamed previously unknown Loc and Entity fields - Improved layout of Loc field inputs - Standardized Obj section labels - Added cache location logging settings.json Configuration: "cacheLocation": "C:\\Users\\Unknown\\Cache\\", // Path to cache directory "originalTheme": false, // Reserved "enableLogging": false // Enables logging to .txt Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.6
body: Changelog: - Add sprite tool (raw version) Features: - Zoom & mouse functionality, - Intelligent buffer size management - Image auto-centering - Sprite data editing - Export buttons - Palette reduction / Color quantization / Sprite cleanup - Metadata export - Validation & error Handling (during load and save) - High-fidelity fata teading (lossless, highest quality sprite decoding) Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.6a
body: Changelog: - Change index export from exporting individual files to exporting whole archives as single files Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.6b
body: Changelog: - Fix paste handling in search field - Move Loc export button to right side Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.6c
body: Changelog: - Fix IllegalArgumentException on zero-dimension sprites - Add progress bar for exporting sprites Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.7
body: Changelog: - Fix sprite writing - Ensure sprite background is transparent and palette is correct - Fix black background issue by preserving index 0 as transparent - Optimize alpha writing and palette size - Maintain compatibility with Sprite decoder Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.7a
body: Changelog: - Hotfix: sprite decode & write now work properly Note: To create an issue or feature request, you must have a GitLab account. Report a bug: Submit an issue Request a feature: Submit a feature request

title: Editor Version: 2.0.8
body:
Changelog:
- Correct display unsigned short values
- Final fix for search freeze

title: Editor Version: 2.1.0
body:
Changelog:
- All sprite editor features work

title: Editor Version: 2.1.1
body:
Changelog:
- Add additional functions and enhance functionality in the file manager

title: Editor Version: 2.1.2
body:
Changelog:
- Fix searchfield

title: Editor Version: 2.1.3
body:
Changelog:
- Simplifying the search field so that it no longer freezes.

title: Editor Version: 1.0.0
body:
Final version of the editor is now available.

The option to enable/disable the official theme can be found in the options included in the zip file.

title: Editor Version: 1.0.1
body:
Changelog:
- Enhanced display of colors and textures changes ([13506,54340], [13501,54340])
- Add missing fields to Object Editor and introduced Interface Editor
- Add kotlin-reflect dependency
- Improved File Manager with popup menus and reduced code complexity (from 1200 to 180 lines)
- Organized packages into intuitive categories
- Minor bug fixes and overall code cleanup

title: Editor Version: 1.0.2
body:
Changelog:
- Removed interface editor
- Refactored ModelExporter to use BoxLayout instead of GroupLayout
- Improved file management in FileManager: fixed JTree details, popup menu, export/import actions, and log area
- Refactored ModelPacker layout (BoxLayout + FlowLayout) to avoid GroupLayout exceptions
- Added support for packing .dat and .gz model files
- Logs now auto-scroll and can be saved/opened as .txt
- Optimized ShadowJar build to reduce JAR size and fix dependency issues
- Preserved tree expansion and selection after any action in FileManager
- Format options in GUI as [Option1,Option2,...]
- Fixed parse color mappings
- Fix Basic tab layouts

title: Editor Version: 1.0.3
body:
Changelog:
- Unify tabs into basic and advanced sections
- Streamline checkbox panel layout with FlowLayout and BorderLayout
- Update usage examples for multiple checkbox groups

title: Editor Version: 1.0.4
body:
Changelog:
- Unified tabs in the interface editor
- Updated labels across multiple interface panels to be more user-friendly
- Improved saving and updating logic for interface components and their properties
- Fixed save functionality for interface components
- Displayed text for Text components in the interface tree
- Refactor interface component editor tree and settings panel

title: Editor Version: 1.0.5
body:
Changelog:
- Added multi-sprite import functionality via file chooser
- Enhanced export/dump options to support all sprites in both DAT and PNG formats
- Added dynamic label displaying current zoom percentage
- Remove interface editor
- Add checkbox to reserve current zoom when changing sprites

title: Editor Version: 1.0.6
body:
Changelog:
- Enhanced the overall layout

title: Editor Version: 1.0.7
body:
Changelogs:
- Reworked handling of adding multiple PNG files
- 'Add Frame' now supports selecting and importing multiple frames at once
- Fixed message dialogs and logs to correctly report the number of added frames
- Export format now follows the "Export as .DAT" checkbox (removed dialog asking for PNG/DAT)
- Added tooltips for all action buttons
- Improved action logs for sprite operations (add, remove, export)
- Adjusted right panel layout: checkboxes are now stacked vertically above tabs
- Improved overall UI consistency and message clarity
- Fixed cache unpacking output
- Added GUI for multi-selecting indices before unpacking
- Added "Select All" / "Unselect All" buttons for quick selection
- Added progress bar showing live unpacking progress per index
- Improved tooltips and user feedback for all unpack operations
- Fixed application exit behavior

title: Editor Version: 1.0.8
body:
Changelogs:
- Fixed unpacking of master index
- Added transfer buttons in the file manager
- Fix double packaging of resources in ShadowJar
- Rename .jar to rs2-editor.jar

title: Editor Version: 1.0.9
body:
Changelogs:
- Reworked application interface
- Removed console
- Fixed Sprite dump: now creates a directory if a sprite has more than 1 frame
- Export indices menu retains old layout but is fully rewritten under the hood, with significantly faster unpacking
- Added DisIO library

title: Editor Version: 1.0.9a
body:
Changelogs:
- Removed version from title
- Add checksum verification for JAR build

title: Editor Version: 1.0.10
body:
Changelogs:
- Added "Generate Reference Table" button for cache
- Fixed FlatFileExporter – now correctly exports archives
- Added export log, JSON and CSV manifest for exported archives
- Progress bar moved to modal dialog
- Added common compress library
- Update tooltips for unpacking gui
- Added FadePanel wrapper to animate new tabs appearing
- Replace checkboxes with list for unpacker
- Add warnings about the cache not being loaded where there were none before
- Remove exit icon from assets
- Fixed tab close button causing tab label to "jump" on hover by using a fixed border
- Close button now changes text color to white on hover for better visibility

title: Editor Version: 1.0.11
body:
Changelog:
- Updated Gradle to 7.1
- Updated ShadowJar plugin to 7.1
- Fixed menu buttons unlocking when no cache is loaded
- Refactored EditorSettings to be stored in-memory instead of JSON
- Added configurable output location for cache rebuild and export tools

title: Editor Version: 1.0.12
body:
Changelog:
- Add basic panel for interfaces
- Add help menu
- Display support information with links for submitting requests or reporting problems
- Fix small UI details and improve layout

title: Editor Version: 1.0.13
body:
Changelog:
- Added animation definition viewer
- Fixed issue where the edit menu appeared when no cache was loaded

title: Editor Version: 1.0.13a
body:
Changelog:
- Fix animation table

title: Editor Version: 1.0.14
body:
Changelog:
- Fixed clone & select problems for NPCs objects items with VirtualListModel UI now update properly
- Fixed ObjectDefinition save/load problem and GUI fields mapping
- Handle full arrays good for modelIds, modelTypes, alternateModelIds, animations, percents
- Add lastValue to transforms and transformVarbitIds good keep null if empty
- Fix extras handling always use mutable map no unsafe cast
- Make sure booleans options recolor palettes parameters save correct
- Change saveFields() to match ObjectEncoder/Decoder avoid data break
- Update parse functions in EditorUtils no problem with nullable or smart cast arrays
- Clean up remove not needed classes
- Remove configs will bring back with everybody after FX change

title: Editor Version: 1.0.15
body:
Changelog:
- Add ability to copy, save components and interfaces

title: Editor Version: 1.0.16
body:
Changelog:
- Added full cache packer and unpacker (works both ways)
- Unpacker now exports all found indices and reference tables
- Saves each file as .dat and also makes a JSON/CSV manifest with CRCs, sizes, flags, and number of archives
- Packer reads source folders and rebuilds the cache
- Creates proper folders automatically for packing and unpacking
- Tool windows now open in the center of the screen
- Upscaled background

title: Editor Version: 1.0.16a
body:
Changelog:
- Fix and improve unpack method
- Fix generating manifest files with metadata

title: Editor Version: 1.0.17
body:
Changelog:
- Added ALL missing fields to each editor (nearly 80 previously missing definitions now included)
- Added another batch of tooltips to fields and buttons for improved usability
- Added separators between definition sections for clarity and visual organization
- Added support for tab reordering - users can now rearrange open editors (Item, NPC, Object) using mouse drag
- Added support for unsigned short arrays and palette byte arrays
- Enhanced array formatting - all arrays are now displayed as [123, 456, 789] and properly sanitized before saving
- Enhanced exception handling and error reporting with detailed diagnostic messages
- Fixed horizontal scroll behavior - GUI is now fully responsive and scrolls only vertically
- Fixed logical issues in serialization order, option handling, and checkbox logic
- Full field and array consistency across all editors (NPC, Item, Object)
- Improved Index Transfer and Region Transfer GUIs for consistency and workflow clarity
- Improved array serialization and deserialization (IntArray, ByteArray, ShortArray)
- Includes ghost preview and highlight of drop position for smooth feedback
- Integrated logging system with Save Log and Open Log functionality
- Optimized cache handling - once the cache is loaded, it remains active after restart without reopening
- Prevented horizontal overflow and hidden fields beyond viewport boundaries
- Reduced popup height in File Manager to fit the entire GUI on screen
- Removed the incomplete Interface Editor (will not return in future builds)
- Removed unpacking function from File Manager and replaced it with OpenRS2 Archive weblink integration
- Reworked Model Packer and Model Exporter for consistency and unified interface
- Reworked Region Transfer and Index Transfer panels - synchronized layouts and behavior
- Streamlined the editor by removing hundreds of unnecessary lines of code and redundant classes
- Unified field save order to match cache structure for better compatibility
- Unified list and field visuals: consistent borders, spacing, and component alignment across the editor
- Unified tabs across all editors - now each editor includes two tabs: definitions and scripts

title: Editor Version: 1.0.17a
body:
Changelog:
- Fix freezing and infinite loop during file, archive, and index export

title: Editor Version: 1.0.17b
body:
Changelog:
- Fix cache saving logic to properly write encoded object

title: Editor Version: 1.0.18
body:
Changelog:
- Optimize package organization and reduce unnecessary files

title: Editor Version: 2.0.0
body:
Changelog:
- Various bug fixes and improvements

title: Editor Version: 2.0.1
body:
Changelog:
- Fix IndexTransfer to correctly transfer indices
- Refactor IndexTransfer and RegionTransfer GUI

title: Editor Version: 2.0.1
body:
Changelog:
- Fix IndexTransfer to correctly transfer indices
- Refactor IndexTransfer and RegionTransfer GUI

title: Editor Version: 2.0.2
body:
Changelog:

- Move settings from old `data/settings.dat` to application directory

title: Oculus v1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
body:
Changelog:
- Extracted old model viewer from legacy cache and improved UI & search
- Rewrote base to work with CacheLibrary instead of Store
- Added live ID-based search filter for models
- Fixed export functionality and cache loading

title: Editor Version: v2.0.3
body:
Changelog:
- Fixed export in FileManager for files, archives, and indexes with proper folder creation
- Added copy & paste functionality
- Added ID field to each editor
- Removed fields unrelated to the 530 revision from load/save
- Updated help section links for github and gitlab issue page
- Renamed project to 530-Editor

body:

- Add note template button to item editor

title: Editor Version: v2.0.7
body:
Changelog:

- Add a gallery with screenshots showing the editor (Tools -> Cache Editor)
- Add Apache Commons Compress library
- Update help links

title: Editor Version: v2.0.8+20251204
body:
Changelog:
- Introduced an option to add an empty archive and file in the File Manager
- Fixed file selection issues

title: Editor Version: v2.0.8+20251205
body:
Changelog:
- Fixed sprite editor

title: Editor Version: v2.0.9+20251230
body:
Changelog:

title: Editor Version: 2.0.10+20260106
body:
Changelog:
- Update iface editor
- Add scripts tab
- Add functional buttons
- Add kotlin-reflect lib

title: Editor Version: 2.0.11+20260106
body:
Changelog:
- Removed some things

title: Editor Version: 2.0.12+20260108
body:
Changelog:
- Adjusted button placement in the sprite editor

title: Editor Version: 2.0.13+20260109
body:
Changelog:
- Add interface editor (based on server interface definition)

title: Editor Version: 2.0.14+20260112
body:
Changelog:
- Add change tracking to IfaceDefinition to save only modified components
- Add support for creating new interfaces (archives) in Interface Editor
- Treat interface as archive and components as separate files
- Automatically create root component (file 0) for new interfaces
- Fix component hierarchy and tree building for newly created interfaces
- Fix component rendering, selection and tree sync after add/remove
- Ensure root component (file 0) is always written before other components
- Fix Negative seek offset caused by writing files before root
- Stabilize saveCurrent() and prevent cache corruption
- Improve iface/component toString() for correct tree labels
- Fix preview initialization and component drawing for new interfaces
- Verified in-game: opening components works correctly
- And much more...

title: Editor Version: 2.0.15+20260113
body:
Changelog: - Added `spritePath` to Main.settings for FontDecoding support (not yet) - Implemented hidden checkbox functionality and others - Improved component retrieval and tree building logic - Added model tab and line defs to text tab - Fixed checkboxes not updating individual preview options - Refactored IfaceLivePreviewPanel to prevent sprite "jumping" on selection - Text rendering: automatically inserts
for lines longer than 84 characters - Precompute sprites now caches properly and respects flipping, tiling, and resizing

title: Editor Version: 2.0.15+20260113
body:
Changelog:
- Refactoring the project structure for clarity and transparency
- Update gradle 7-1 to 8.5
- Fix interface editor bugs

title: Editor Version: 2.0.16+20260115
body:
Changelog:
- Temporary disabled of the iface editor
- Add enum editor with popup-based editing
- Unified EnumDefinition with full cache compatibility
- JSON import/export, load configs from templates
- Improved UX, logging, and safety of edits

title: Editor Version: 2.0.17+20260115
body:
Changelog:
- Write default value last in EnumEncoder for cleaner cache layout
- Fix showExampleJson to work from JAR
- Update About section with BSD-3-Clause (GregHib/void) and Kotlin Reflect

title: Editor Version: 2.0.18+20260116
body:
Changelog:
- Migrated Gradle build scripts from Groovy to Kotlin DSL
- Cleaned up classes and performed full code refactor (Reduced JAR size by ~4MB)
- Created generic modules for editor loading
- Fixed and improved GUI model export

title: Editor Version: 2.0.19+20260117
body:
Changelog:
- Add struct editor

title: Editor Version: 2.0.20+20260226
body:
Changelog:
- Added ESC key shortcut to close editor windows
- Added Identity Kit editor
- Added animated loading dialogs
- Added copy/paste context menu for config editors
- Added external website confirmation dialogs
- Added real-time input validation for config editors
- Added version comparison and update notification utility
- Added fallback UI on macOS and support for systems that do not support Darklaf
- Detect and focus already opened editor tabs instead of reopening them
- Enhanced Region Tools (map and landscape dumping, index generation)
- Extracted Interface Editor into a standalone application
- Fixed Struct editor data display and editing logic
- Fixed cache rebuild progress bar updates
- Fixed window title inconsistencies
- Highlighted cache path using type-specific toast notification colors
- Improved definition editor input fields for cleaner and more consistent data entry
- Refactored configuration editors to edit the entire entry instead of a single row
- Refactored menu bar and menu items
- Improved buttons layout and visual effects
- Fixed previous restriction that prevented toggling theme
- Minor fixes and small corrections (small code, UI, or text improvements)

title: Oculus Version: 1.0.1
body:
Changelog:
- Reduced app size to 2 MB
- Centered model rendering
- Fixed model export
- Improved renderer stability
- Save cache path after selection

body:
Changelog:

- Fix buttons for copying and pasting components

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.6

Changelog:

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.7
body:
Changelog:
- Add basic resize handling
- Removed cursors from save/load

title: Editor Version: 2.0.21+20260302
body:
Changelog:

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.8
body:
Changelog:
- Add multi-copy button

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.9
body:
Changelog:
- Paint models
- Add sprite search, preview (zoom), help
- Add model manager
- Improved the docs, reorganized submenus
- Add scripts and interface references
- Improve interface renderer performance and sprite rendering

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.10
body:
Changelog:
- Restore sprite tiling
- Fix NPE in `MultiCopy` and temporarily disable interface file import

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.11
body:
Changelog:
- Recalculate `componentHash` after `componentId` changes
- Prevent overwriting existing components when pasting into a target interface
- Move copy button next to the paste button
- Fix incorrect `parentId` remapping for copied components
- Fix MultiCopy refresh issue where changes were not visible until restarting the application
- Ensure `startAt` is respected when copying components
- Ensure frames reflect changes after deletion and update frame counter in `SpriteManager`
- Fix interface slot saving and settings mask handling
- Add optional component naming and display in UI

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.12
body:
Changelog:
- Move component name input to property panel
- Remove popup dialog used when saving components
- Allow editing component name directly in the property panel
- Restore the save method accidentally removed in the previous commit
- Prevent model components from resizing when selecting them
- Sprite now appears in the center of the preview
- RenderPanel now allows dragging components with mouse
- Implemented Ctrl+Z for undo and Ctrl+Y for redo
- Added tooltips and keyboard shortcuts to Undo/Redo menu items
- Add toggle mouse button
- Add hand cursor when dragging components
- Add option to create a backup from `JMenuItem`
- Fix model rotation in model viewer

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.13
body:
Changelog:
- Removed data files, fix typo
- Remove popup dialog used when saving components
- Fix component copy/paste across interfaces, add version checking
- Implement deep copy using encode/decode
- Fix componentId and componentHash handling
- Add support for copying component hierarchy
- Prevent overwriting components in cache
- Enable cross-interface paste
- Add Check for updates functionality with remote version validation
- Fix remote version validation url
- Fix single vs multi-frame sprite export properly

title: Interface Editor Version: 1.0.14
body:
Changelog:
- Ensure config.properties is created and loaded from JAR directory

title: Oculus Version: 1.0.3
body:
Changelog:
- Fix for freezing during model search 
-Save the last cache location 
-Cache selection options
-Add option to select the folder for exporting models
-The background has been changed to gray
